features_sql.description: Your HogQL feature query, using the {anchors}/{lookback_days} contract. Must be a read-only SELECT keyed on person_id (aliased to distinct_id), one row per user. The backend runs it server-side against the labeled training population — no 500-row cap — and writes the resulting train/holdout feature and label parquet files into your sandbox.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this autoresearch training run.
